Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Beneficiary To Determine Entitlement To Distribution And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Baxter appeared by telephone for Gail Ellison-Goode (Petitioner).
Stacie Nelson for Kenneth Goode and Leonard Goode (Beneficiaries).

The Court noted that is has this petition before it today and a competing petition for rescission of the gift with a hearing date of October 7th, that it has seen the joint statement and that there is an indication of the parties wanting to do mediation. Counsel both indicated that they are interested in mediation. The Court noted that the matter does not qualify for pro bono mediation and that the parties will have to do private mediation. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution, etc. and the Petition for Rescission of Gift, etc. are continued to November 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to provide a joint statement as to the outcome of mediation no later than October 29, 2019. If mediation is unsuccessful, the Parties are to have met and conferred and include in the joint statement where things stand in the litigation and where to proceed from there. The Court also noted that other Parties have come in at different times and stated that Counsel is to make sure that all parties participate in the mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition By Beneficiary To Determine Entitlement To Distribution And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Bonsignore for Gail Ellison-Goode (Petitioner).
Stacie Nelson for Kenneth Goode and Leonard Goode.

Ms. Nelson stated that discovery is not yet completed, that Ms. Goode no longer wants to mediate and wants to move towards trial, and that they now have to do full blown discovery. Ms. Nelson also stated that she needs to take five depositions, that a number of third party subpoenaes have been served, but she has not received anything back, and that she believes discovery will be concluded by the end of Summer. Mr. Bonsignore stated that they have conducted pretty much all of the discovery they wanted to perform. The Court informed Counsel that trial will not happen while all of this discovery is still outstanding. Mr. Borsignore stated that his Client is not interested in mediation at this time, but he can attempt to nudge her. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution, etc. is continued to August 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the Court can set a trial date. A joint status statement is to be filed by August 21, 2019. The parties are to have met and conferred as to how long the trial will be, how many witnesses they will have, how many exhibits they will have and to see if there are any stipulations they can enter into. Ms. Nelson stated that she feels upon conclusion of discovery, the matter will be ripe for a motion for summary judgment or a motion for summary adjudication.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition By Beneficiary To Determine Entitlement To Distribution And For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aaron Johnson appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Kyong Kim for Leonard Goode and Kenneth goode (Respondents).

Counsel reported that they are in the middle of discovery, that both parties anticipate doing depositions, that things are progressing well and requested a 90-day continuance. Ms. Kim stated that she is amenable to mediation, but she can't do it until she has completed discovery. The Petition by Beneficiary to Determine Entitlement to Distribution and for Accounting is continued to June 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that discovery is completed, and that the parties have made a determination as to whether they will be doing mediation or pursuing other ways to get to resolution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition By Beneficiary To Determine Entitlement To Distribution And For Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gene Pendergast appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Kyong Kim for Leonard Goode and Kenneth Goode (Beneficiaries).
Kevin Rodriguez for Leonard Goode (Co-Trustee of the Survivor's Trust).
Ronald Alling appeared by telephone for Kenneth Goode (Co-Trustee).

Counsel stated that they have not spoken as to how to proceed towards resolution, that they will be conducting discovery and that Ms. Kim's Client are not ready to mediate now. The Court noted that this case is not eligible for pro bono mediation and stated that they will have to do private mediation if they choose. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution and for Accounting is continued to March 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the parties will meet and confer as to whether they are willing to mediate and a plan on how to get to a form of resolution. The Parties are to submit a joint status statement by March 6, 2019. The Court informed Counsel that it will not order an accounting at this time.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
